Pebble watchface app that counts down and crashes, with build scripts and version control configurations.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: A Pebble watchface app that counts down and intentionally crashes after a set time.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Configuration to ignore build generated files in version control.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Configuration for the "crash_demo_watchface" app, specifying metadata and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
